# linsk27

> linsk27 的个人项目主页，聚焦 Vue、TypeScript、AI Coding、本地开发工具、GitHub Actions、Flask、MySQL 和全栈项目实践。

Main site: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/
GitHub profile: https://github.com/linsk27
Project hub: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/

## Core projects

- Dev Cockpit: local development dashboard for restoring project state, commands, logs, ports, Git status, runtime diagnostics, and AI coding context. Project page: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/dev-cockpit/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/local-dev-cockpit
- ProofPR: GitHub Action and CLI for pull request evidence scanning, PR triage, dependency risk, workflow permission checks, secrets detection, MCP security, and maintainer review guidance. Project page: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/proofpr/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/proof-pr
- AI-Vue3-python-flask-Blog: Vue 3, Flask, MySQL and AI blog system for full-stack practice, course design, graduation project, and secondary development. Project page: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/ai-vue-flask-blog/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/AI-Vue3-python-flask-Blog Demo: https://ai-vue3-python-flask-blog.vercel.app/
- AI-v0.dev-: Next.js and TypeScript prototype for AI learning dashboards, v0.dev UI experiments, product interface design, progress tracking, and project cards. Project page: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/ai-v0-dev/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/AI-v0.dev-
- Vue-blog: Vue blog front-end project with article pages, AI center, and data analysis dashboard screens. Project page: https://linsk27-github-io.vercel.app/projects/vue-blog/ Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/Vue-blog Demo: https://vue-blog-smoky.vercel.app/

## Additional projects

- bilibili-nuxt3: Nuxt 3 and TypeScript practice project for modern front-end app structure. Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/bilibili-nuxt3
- echarts-learn: Vue and ECharts data visualization practice for chart expression and interaction details. Repository: https://github.com/linsk27/echarts-learn

## Topics

Vue, TypeScript, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Nuxt, Node.js, Vite, Electron, GitHub Actions, AI Coding, developer tools, local development, pull request review automation, Flask, Python, MySQL, ECharts, full-stack projects, AI UI prototype, learning dashboard, Vue blog.
